# FIX 6: claw.bat - pure ASCII, no Unicode
cat > $BASE/claw.bat << 'BATEOF'
@echo off
REM ============================================================
REM  claw.bat - Lanzador ClawSpring para Windows
REM  Doble clic para abrir. Solo ASCII puro.
REM ============================================================

REM UTF-8 en consola (Bug #4)
chcp 65001 > nul 2>&1
set PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8

REM Titulo de la ventana
title Claw - Asistente IA de [REDACTED_INFRASTRUCTURE]

REM Ir a la carpeta del script
cd /d "%~dp0"

REM Verificar Python
python --version > nul 2>&1
if errorlevel 1 (
    echo ERROR: Python no encontrado.
    echo Instala Python desde https://python.org
    pause
    exit /b 1
)

REM Verificar Ollama
curl -s http://localhost:11434/api/tags > nul 2>&1
if errorlevel 1 (
    echo Iniciando Ollama...
    start /B ollama serve
    timeout /t 3 > nul
)

REM API key local para Ollama
set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=ollama

REM Iniciar ClawSpring
echo Iniciando Claw...
python clawspring.py --model ollama/qwen3.5:latest %*

REM Si cierra con error
if errorlevel 1 (
    echo.
    echo Claw termino con error.
    pause
)
BATEOF
echo "claw.bat: reescrito ASCII puro"

content.text:
Listo. Este es el zip definitivo con el repositorio completo.

---

## Qué tenían roto Claude 2 y 3

Descubrieron bugs reales pero los resolvieron a medias y crearon nuevos:

| Bug | Claude 2/3 | Estado en claw_final.zip |
|---|---|---|
| `think` en raíz del JSON | Lo movieron pero lo pusieron en `options` como campo suelto | ✅ Corregido — va dentro de `payload["options"]["think"]` |
| `claw.bat` con Unicode | Lo "limpiaron" pero el archivo seguía siendo UTF-8 | ✅ Ahora es ASCII puro |
| `ModuleNotFoundError` | Lo resolvieron correctamente con el repositorio completo | ✅ Mantenido |
| `from __future__` posición | Lo corrigieron correctamente | ✅ Mantenido |
| UTF-8 Windows | No lo aplicaron | ✅ Agregado ahora |
| `cmd_memory` AgentState | No lo aplicaron | ✅ Agregado ahora |
| `num_ctx` 128000 | No lo tocaron | ✅ Corregido a 8192 |
| Whitelist de tools | No estaba | ✅ Agregado ahora |

**Instalación:**
```powershell
Expand-Archive "$env:USERPROFILE\Downloads\claw_final.zip" -DestinationPath "[LOCAL_PATH]" -Force
```

Luego copia el shortcut al escritorio:
```powershell
Copy-Item "[LOCAL_PATH]" "$env:USERPROFILE\Desktop\claw.bat"
```

chat_messages.text:
Looking at the logs, the real problem now is clear:

```
RuntimeError: Ollama HTTP 500 en http://localhost:11434/api/chat
Modelo: qwen3.5:latest
Detalle: {"error":"model requires more system memory (8.0 GiB) than is available (4.5 GiB)"}
```

[REDACTED_INFRASTRUCTURE]'s PC only has 4.5 GB of available RAM, and qwen3.5:latest needs 8 GB. The installed models are:
- gemma:latest - 5.0 GB
- qwen3.5:latest - 6.6 GB  
- gemma4:latest - 9.6 GB

None of these will fit in 4.5 GB available RAM! He needs a smaller model. The solution is to pull qwen2.5:1.5b (1 GB) or a similar small model.

The HTTP 500 error is NOT a code bug - it's a hardware limitation. [REDACTED_INFRASTRUCTURE] only has ~4.5 GB free RAM and all his models are too big.

The fix is simple: pull a smaller model.El error ya no es código — es **RAM**. Mira el mensaje exacto de Ollama:

```
model requires more system memory (8.0 GiB) than is available (4.5 GiB)
```

Qwen3.5 pesa 6.6 GB y solo tiene 4.5 GB libres. Todos los modelos instalados son demasiado grandes:

| Modelo | Tamaño | ¿Cabe? |
|---|---|---|
| gemma:latest | 5.0 GB | ❌ |
| qwen3.5:latest | 6.6 GB | ❌ |
| gemma4:latest | 9.6 GB | ❌ |

La solución es descargar un modelo pequeño. Corre esto ahora:

```powershell
ollama pull qwen2.5:1.5b
```

Pesa solo **1 GB**, corre en 4.5 GB de RAM sin problema, y sí soporta tools. Cuando termine:

```powershell
python clawspring.py --model ollama/qwen2.5:1.5b
```

Y actualiza la función `claw` en el perfil para que use ese modelo por defecto:

```powershell
notepad $PROFILE
```

Cambia `qwen3.5:latest` por `qwen2.5:1.5b` en la línea de python, guarda y corre `. $PROFILE`.

¿Cuánta RAM total tiene el PC de [REDACTED_INFRASTRUCTURE]? Con `16 GB` totales y solo `4.5 GB` libres significa que tiene Chrome u otros programas pesados abiertos. Cerrar el navegador antes de abrir Claw libera suficiente memoria para modelos más grandes.

chat_messages.text:
The user has two questions:
1. Claw still shows "thinking" and they have to type something to get a response
2. How to make the desktop shortcut work

Let me address both.Dos cosas separadas:

---

## 1. El "pensando" de Claw

Eso es normal con Qwen3.5 en CPU — está generando la respuesta internamente antes de mostrarla. No hay que hacer nada, solo esperar. Si quieres ver el progreso en tiempo real:

```
python clawspring.py --model ollama/qwen3.5:latest --verbose
```

Con `--verbose` muestra el texto mientras lo genera en vez de esperar al final.

---

## 2. El acceso directo del escritorio

El `claw.bat` del zip `claw_final.zip` ya está listo. Solo hay que extraer y copiar:

```powershell
# Extraer el zip
Expand-Archive "$env:USERPROFILE\Downloads\claw_final.zip" -DestinationPath "$env:USERPROFILE\Downloads\" -Force

# Copiar el bat al escritorio
Copy-Item "$env:USERPROFILE\Downloads\claw_completo\claw.bat" "$env:USERPROFILE\Desktop\claw.bat" -Force
```

Doble clic en el ícono del escritorio y arranca solo sin tocar PowerShell.

Si quieres que también cierre Chrome automáticamente antes de abrir Claw, puedo modificar el `claw.bat` para que lo haga solo. ¿Lo hago?

chat_messages.text:
El ícono con el círculo y guión significa que el archivo está **solo en OneDrive en la nube**, no descargado localmente. Por eso no funciona — Windows intenta abrirlo pero no está en el PC físicamente.

Dos soluciones:

**Solución rápida — copiar el bat directamente al escritorio local:**

```powershell
Copy-Item "$env:USERPROFILE\Downloads\claw.bat" "[LOCAL_PATH]" -Force
```

**Si sigue con el ícono de nube**, clic derecho en el archivo → **Mantener siempre en este dispositivo**.

Después doble clic y debe abrir. ¿Funciona?

chat_messages.text:
0.3 GB libre — eso explica todo. Con 300 MB libres Qwen3.5 no puede ni arrancar.

Cierra todo ahora mismo:

```powershell
# Cerrar Chrome, Edge, y otros procesos pesados
taskkill /F /IM chrome.exe > nul 2>&1
taskkill /F /IM msedge.exe > nul 2>&1
taskkill /F /IM firefox.exe > nul 2>&1
taskkill /F /IM Code.exe > nul 2>&1
```

Después verifica cuánta RAM quedó libre:

```powershell
Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem | Select-Object @{n='RAM Libre GB';e={[math]::Round($_.FreePhysicalMemory/1MB,1)}}
```

Si sigue baja, el problema es que Windows mismo está consumiendo demasiado. En ese caso la solución real es usar el modelo pequeño:

```powershell
ollama pull qwen2.5:1.5b
```

1 GB, responde en segundos, y con 0.3 GB libre igual no va a funcionar Qwen3.5 por más que cierres cosas.

```powershell
ollama stop qwen3.5:latest
```

Después cierra Roblox, Notion y Chrome también:

```powershell
Stop-Process -Name "RobloxPlayerBeta" -Force
Stop-Process -Name "Notion" -Force  
Stop-Process -Name "chrome" -Force
```

Verifica la RAM libre:

```powershell
Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem | Select-Object @{n='RAM Libre GB';e={[math]::Round($_.FreePhysicalMemory/1MB,1)}}
```

Con Ollama descargado deberían liberarse 4 GB de golpe — más que suficiente para volver a cargar Qwen3.5 limpio y responder en segundos.

input.command:
cat > [LOCAL_PATH] << 'EOF'
@echo off
chcp 65001 > nul 2>&1
set PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8
title Claw - Asistente IA
cd /d "[LOCAL_PATH] (2)\claw_completo"
set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=ollama

REM Liberar RAM antes de arrancar
taskkill /F /IM RobloxPlayerBeta.exe 2>nul
taskkill /F /IM Notion.exe 2>nul
taskkill /F /IM chrome.exe 2>nul
ollama stop qwen3.5:latest 2>nul
timeout /t 2 > nul

echo Iniciando Claw...
"[LOCAL_PATH]" clawspring.py --model ollama/qwen3.5:latest
if errorlevel 1 pause
EOF
file [LOCAL_PATH] && echo OK

cat > [LOCAL_PATH] << 'EOF'
const { Document, Packer, Paragraph, TextRun, Table, TableRow, TableCell,
        AlignmentType, HeadingLevel, BorderStyle, WidthType, ShadingType,
        LevelFormat, Header, Footer, PageBreak } = require('docx');
const fs = require('fs');

const BLUE = "1F4E79";
const ACCENT = "2E75B6";
const LIGHT = "EBF3FB";
const GREEN_BG = "E8F5E9";
const GREEN = "1B5E20";
const ORANGE_BG = "FFF3E0";
const ORANGE = "BF360C";
const RED_BG = "FFEBEE";
const GRAY = "424242";

const b = { style: BorderStyle.SINGLE, size: 1, color: "CCCCCC" };
const borders = { top: b, bottom: b, left: b, right: b };

const h1 = t => new Paragraph({
  heading: HeadingLevel.HEADING_1,
  spacing: { before: 320, after: 100 },
  border: { bottom: { style: BorderStyle.SINGLE, size: 6, color: ACCENT, space: 4 } },
  children: [new TextRun({ text: t, bold: true, size: 28, color: BLUE, font: "Arial" })]
});

const h2 = t => new Paragraph({
  heading: HeadingLevel.HEADING_2,
  spacing: { before: 200, after: 80 },
  children: [new TextRun({ text: t, bold: true, size: 24, color: ACCENT, font: "Arial" })]
});

const p = (t, opts={}) => new Paragraph({
  spacing: { before: 40, after: 80 },
  children: [new TextRun({ text: t, size: 22, font: "Arial", color: GRAY, ...opts })]
});

const code = t => new Paragraph({
  spacing: { before: 20, after: 20 },
  shading: { fill: "F5F5F5", type: ShadingType.CLEAR },
  indent: { left: 360 },
  children: [new TextRun({ text: t, size: 18, font: "Courier New", color: "1A237E" })]
});

const sp = () => new Paragraph({ spacing: { after: 80 }, children: [new TextRun("")] });
const pb = () => new Paragraph({ children: [new PageBreak()] });

const tbl = (rows, widths) => new Table({
  width: { size: 9360, type: WidthType.DXA },
  columnWidths: widths,
  rows: [
    new TableRow({
      tableHeader: true,
      children: rows[0].map((t, i) => new TableCell({
        borders,
        width: { size: widths[i], type: WidthType.DXA },
        shading: { fill: ACCENT, type: ShadingType.CLEAR },
        margins: { top: 80, bottom: 80, left: 120, right: 120 },
        children: [new Paragraph({ children: [new TextRun({ text: t, bold: true, size: 20, font: "Arial", color: "FFFFFF" })] })]
      }))
    }),
    ...rows.slice(1).map((row, ri) => new TableRow({
      children: row.map((t, i) => new TableCell({
        borders,
        width: { size: widths[i], type: WidthType.DXA },
        shading: { fill: ri % 2 === 0 ? LIGHT : "FFFFFF", type: ShadingType.CLEAR },
        margins: { top: 80, bottom: 80, left: 120, right: 120 },
        children: [new Paragraph({ children: [new TextRun({ text: t, size: 20, font: "Arial", color: GRAY })] })]
      }))
    }))
  ]
});

const box = (title, content, bg, tc) => new Table({
  width: { size: 9360, type: WidthType.DXA },
  columnWidths: [9360],
  rows: [new TableRow({ children: [new TableCell({
    borders,
    width: { size: 9360, type: WidthType.DXA },
    shading: { fill: bg, type: ShadingType.CLEAR },
    margins: { top: 100, bottom: 100, left: 180, right: 180 },
    children: [
      new Paragraph({ spacing: { after: 60 }, children: [new TextRun({ text: title, bold: true, size: 22, font: "Arial", color: tc })] }),
      new Paragraph({ spacing: { after: 0 }, children: [new TextRun({ text: content, size: 20, font: "Arial", color: GRAY })] })
    ]
  })]})],
});

const doc = new Document({
  numbering: { config: [{ reference: "b", levels: [{ level: 0, format: LevelFormat.BULLET, text: "\u2022",
    alignment: AlignmentType.LEFT, style: { paragraph: { indent: { left: 540, hanging: 260 } } } }] }] },
  styles: {
    default: { document: { run: { font: "Arial", size: 22, color: GRAY } } },
    paragraphStyles: [
      { id: "Heading1", name: "Heading 1", basedOn: "Normal", next: "Normal", quickFormat: true,
        run: { size: 28, bold: true, font: "Arial", color: BLUE }, paragraph: { spacing: { before: 320, after: 100 }, outlineLevel: 0 } },
      { id: "Heading2", name: "Heading 2", basedOn: "Normal", next: "Normal", quickFormat: true,
        run: { size: 24, bold: true, font: "Arial", color: ACCENT }, paragraph: { spacing: { before: 200, after: 80 }, outlineLevel: 1 } },
    ]
  },
  sections: [{
    properties: { page: { size: { width: 12240, height: 15840 }, margin: { top: 1440, right: 1080, bottom: 1440, left: 1080 } } },
    headers: { default: new Header({ children: [new Paragraph({
      border: { bottom: { style: BorderStyle.SINGLE, size: 4, color: ACCENT, space: 4 } },
      spacing: { after: 80 },
      children: [new TextRun({ text: "ClawSpring — Informe Fase 2 para Claudes futuros  |  [REDACTED_INFRASTRUCTURE], Mayo 2026", size: 18, font: "Arial", color: ACCENT })]
    })]}) },
    children: [

      // PORTADA
      new Paragraph({ alignment: AlignmentType.CENTER, spacing: { after: 100 },
        children: [new TextRun({ text: "INFORME FASE 2", size: 48, bold: true, font: "Arial", color: BLUE })] }),
      new Paragraph({ alignment: AlignmentType.CENTER, spacing: { after: 80 },
        children: [new TextRun({ text: "ClawSpring + Ollama + Qwen3.5 en CPU", size: 28, font: "Arial", color: ACCENT })] }),
      new Paragraph({ alignment: AlignmentType.CENTER, spacing: { after: 60 },
        children: [new TextRun({ text: "Para Claudes futuros que continuen el proyecto  |  Mayo 2026", size: 20, font: "Arial", color: "888888", italics: true })] }),
      new Paragraph({ alignment: AlignmentType.CENTER,
        border: { bottom: { style: BorderStyle.SINGLE, size: 8, color: ACCENT, space: 8 } },
        spacing: { after: 200 }, children: [new TextRun(" ")] }),
      sp(),

      box("Para el Claude que lea esto",
        "Este informe documenta el estado REAL del proyecto Claw de [REDACTED_INFRASTRUCTURE] despues de 3 sesiones con " +
        "diferentes instancias de Claude. Contiene los bugs corregidos, los que siguen pendientes, " +
        "el hardware real del PC, y las directivas que DEBES seguir para no romper lo que ya funciona.",
        LIGHT, ACCENT),

      pb(),

      // 1. HARDWARE
      h1("1. Hardware Real del PC de [REDACTED_INFRASTRUCTURE]"),
      box("CRITICO — Lee esto antes de sugerir cualquier modelo",
        "RAM total: 16 GB | RAM disponible normal: 4-6 GB | Sin GPU dedicada (CPU only) | " +
        "Windows 11 con OneDrive activo | Python en ruta no estandar",
        ORANGE_BG, ORANGE),
      sp(),
      tbl([
        ["Componente", "Valor", "Impacto en Claw"],
        ["RAM Total", "16 GB", "Suficiente en teoria"],
        ["RAM disponible real", "4-6 GB (con todo cerrado)", "Limite real de operacion"],
        ["GPU", "Ninguna dedicada", "Todo corre en CPU — lento"],
        ["Python path", "[LOCAL_PATH]", "Usar ruta completa en .bat"],
        ["Carpeta Claw", "[LOCAL_PATH] (2)\\claw_completo", "Ruta con espacios y parentesis"],
        ["Escritorio", "[LOCAL_PATH]", "OneDrive — NO es ruta estandar"],
        ["Ollama version", "0.22.1", "Soporta Qwen3.5 y gemma"],
      ], [2500, 3500, 3360]),
      sp(),

      h2("Modelos instalados"),
      tbl([
        ["Modelo", "Tamano", "RAM necesaria", "Recomendado"],
        ["qwen3.5:latest", "6.6 GB", "8+ GB libres", "SI — modelo principal"],
        ["gemma:latest", "5.0 GB", "6+ GB libres", "No (sin tools)"],
        ["gemma4:latest", "9.6 GB", "12+ GB libres", "No (demasiado grande)"],
        ["qwen2.5:1.5b", "1 GB", "2 GB libres", "Backup si hay poca RAM"],
      ], [2800, 1800, 2200, 2560]),
      sp(),

      h2("Proceso para liberar RAM antes de usar Claw"),
      p("El bat del escritorio ya hace esto automaticamente, pero si falla manualmente:"),
      code("ollama stop qwen3.5:latest"),
      code("Stop-Process -Name RobloxPlayerBeta -Force"),
      code("Stop-Process -Name Notion -Force"),
      code("Stop-Process -Name chrome -Force"),
      code("# Verificar RAM libre:"),
      code("Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem | Select-Object @{n='RAM Libre GB';e={[math]::Round($_.FreePhysicalMemory/1MB,1)}}"),
      p("Necesita minimo 6 GB libres para Qwen3.5. Con menos, usar qwen2.5:1.5b."),

      pb(),

      // 2. ESTADO DEL CODIGO
      h1("2. Estado del Codigo — Bugs Corregidos"),
      tbl([
        ["Bug", "Archivo", "Estado", "Descripcion"],
        ["IndentationError", "providers.py", "CORREGIDO", "Codigo muerto de Tails eliminado"],
        ["HTTP 400 tools", "providers.py", "CORREGIDO", "Whitelist de modelos con tools"],
        ["Texto vacio", "providers.py", "CORREGIDO", "yield TextChunk en vez de dict"],
        ["Duplicados", "providers.py", "CORREGIDO", "AssistantTurn solo al final del stream"],
        ["AgentState.get", "clawspring.py", "CORREGIDO", "hasattr en cmd_memory"],
        ["model_base prefix", "providers.py", "CORREGIDO", "split('/') para ollama/ prefix"],
        ["num_ctx 128000", "providers.py", "CORREGIDO", "min(config, 32768) fallback"],
        ["--no-tools arg", "clawspring.py", "CORREGIDO", "Argumento agregado al parser"],
        ["UTF-8 Windows", "clawspring.py", "CORREGIDO", "sys.stdout.reconfigure al inicio"],
        ["think en raiz JSON", "providers.py", "CORREGIDO", "Movido a payload[options][think]"],
        ["from __future__ pos", "clawspring.py", "CORREGIDO", "Linea 2 despues del shebang"],
        ["claw.bat Unicode", "claw.bat", "CORREGIDO", "ASCII puro, sin simbolos Unicode"],
        ["ModuleNotFoundError", "estructura", "CORREGIDO", "ZIP con repo completo"],
      ], [2200, 2200, 1760, 3200]),
      sp(),

      h2("Archivos corregidos y su ubicacion"),
      tbl([
        ["Archivo", "Ruta en el PC"],
        ["clawspring.py", "[LOCAL_PATH] (2)\\claw_completo\\clawspring.py"],
        ["providers.py", "[LOCAL_PATH] (2)\\claw_completo\\providers.py"],
        ["claw.bat", "[LOCAL_PATH]"],
        ["claw_personalidad.py", "[LOCAL_PATH] (2)\\claw_completo\\claw_personalidad.py"],
      ], [2400, 6960]),

      pb(),

      // 3. DIRECTIVAS
      h1("3. Directivas OBLIGATORIAS para Claudes Futuros"),
      box("PROTOCOLO DE DESARROLLO CLAW — Aplicar en cada respuesta", "", ORANGE_BG, ORANGE),
      sp(),

      h2("Directiva 1 — ZIP Self-Contained"),
      p("NUNCA entregues parches aislados. Si generas un ZIP debe contener el repositorio completo con todos los modulos: config.py, context.py, agent.py, tools.py, compaction.py, memory/, mcp/, plugin/, skill/, task/, voice/."),
      sp(),

      h2("Directiva 2 — from __future__ es Prioridad 0"),
      p("Esta linea DEBE ser la primera instruccion ejecutable del archivo (linea 2 si hay shebang). Ningun codigo de sys.path, import os, ni fix de UTF-8 puede ir antes. El fix de UTF-8 va despues."),
      code("#!/usr/bin/env python3"),
      code("from __future__ import annotations"),
      code("# === UTF-8 fix DESPUES de __future__ ==="),
      code("import sys, os"),
      code("if sys.platform == 'win32':"),
      code("    sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding='utf-8', errors='replace')"),
      sp(),

      h2("Directiva 3 — claw.bat solo ASCII"),
      p("Windows CMD no soporta Unicode en scripts .bat. PROHIBIDO usar: emojis, simbolos decorativos (==, ---, ===), caracteres latinos especiales (tildes, enye). Solo letras A-Z, numeros, guiones simples y espacios."),
      p("Verificar con: file claw.bat — debe decir 'ASCII text', nunca 'UTF-8 text'."),
      sp(),

      h2("Directiva 4 — think dentro de options{}"),
      p("El parametro think de Qwen3 DEBE ir dentro del objeto options del payload, no en la raiz:"),
      code("# CORRECTO:"),
      code("payload['options']['think'] = False"),
      code("# INCORRECTO (da HTTP 500):"),
      code("payload['think'] = False"),
      sp(),

      h2("Directiva 5 — Python path explicito en Windows"),
      p("El PATH de Python de [REDACTED_INFRASTRUCTURE] no es estandar. En cualquier .bat o script que generes, usar ruta completa:"),
      code("[LOCAL_PATH]"),
      sp(),

      h2("Directiva 6 — Ruta del Escritorio no estandar"),
      p("El escritorio de [REDACTED_INFRASTRUCTURE] esta en OneDrive, no en la ruta estandar:"),
      code("# CORRECTO:"),
      code("[LOCAL_PATH]"),
      code("# INCORRECTO:"),
      code("[LOCAL_PATH]"),

      pb(),

      // 4. ESTADO FASE 2
      h1("4. Estado Fase 2"),
      tbl([
        ["Objetivo", "Estado", "Detalle"],
        ["Acceso directo escritorio", "COMPLETADO", "claw.bat en OneDrive\\Desktop funciona con doble clic"],
        ["Liberar RAM automatico", "COMPLETADO", "bat cierra Roblox, Notion, Chrome, descarga modelo viejo"],
        ["Personalidad Jarvis", "COMPLETADO", "claw_personalidad.py integrado en REPL"],
        ["Memoria persistente", "COMPLETADO", "/memory consolidate funciona"],
        ["Qwen3.5 respondiendo", "COMPLETADO", "Responde en 3-4 min en CPU con 6+ GB libres"],
        ["Bot de Telegram", "PENDIENTE", "/telegram TOKEN CHAT_ID — listo para configurar"],
        ["Whisper transcripcion", "PENDIENTE", "pip install openai-whisper — ya instalado en realidad"],
        ["Voz en vivo", "PENDIENTE", "pip install sounddevice soundfile"],
        ["GPU dedicada", "FASE 4", "Post [REDACTED_INFRASTRUCTURE] — RTX 3060 minimo"],
      ], [3200, 1960, 4200]),
      sp(),

      // 5. PROXIMOS PASOS
      h1("5. Proximos Pasos para el Siguiente Claude"),
      p("Cuando [REDACTED_INFRASTRUCTURE] vuelva, el siguiente Claude debe:"),
      new Paragraph({ numbering: { reference: "b", level: 0 }, spacing: { before: 40, after: 40 },
        children: [new TextRun({ text: "Verificar que claw.bat abre con doble clic sin errores", size: 22, font: "Arial", color: GRAY })] }),
      new Paragraph({ numbering: { reference: "b", level: 0 }, spacing: { before: 40, after: 40 },
        children: [new TextRun({ text: "Configurar Telegram: /telegram TOKEN CHAT_ID dentro de Claw", size: 22, font: "Arial", color: GRAY })] }),
      new Paragraph({ numbering: { reference: "b", level: 0 }, spacing: { before: 40, after: 40 },
        children: [new TextRun({ text: "Configurar pipeline Whisper para clases del grupo 500", size: 22, font: "Arial", color: GRAY })] }),
      new Paragraph({ numbering: { reference: "b", level: 0 }, spacing: { before: 40, after: 40 },
        children: [new TextRun({ text: "Recordar: 3-4 minutos de espera es NORMAL en CPU para primer mensaje", size: 22, font: "Arial", color: GRAY })] }),
      new Paragraph({ numbering: { reference: "b", level: 0 }, spacing: { before: 40, after: 40 },
        children: [new TextRun({ text: "Si hay menos de 6 GB libres: usar qwen2.5:1.5b como fallback", size: 22, font: "Arial", color: GRAY })] }),
      sp(),

      box("Meta de [REDACTED_INFRASTRUCTURE]", "Sacar 500 en el [REDACTED_INFRASTRUCTURE] 2026. Con ese puntaje puede acceder a mejores oportunidades " +
        "y despues si viene la GPU, la API de Anthropic y el Jarvis completo. Por ahora Claw en CPU es suficiente " +
        "para organizar apuntes, transcribir clases con Whisper y estudiar.", LIGHT, ACCENT),

      sp(), sp(),
      new Paragraph({ alignment: AlignmentType.CENTER,
        border: { top: { style: BorderStyle.SINGLE, size: 4, color: ACCENT, space: 8 } },
        spacing: { before: 200 },
        children: [new TextRun({ text: "Generado por Claude para continuidad del proyecto Claw  |  Mayo 2026", size: 18, font: "Arial", color: "888888", italics: true })]
      }),
    ]
  }]
});

Packer.toBuffer(doc).then(buf => {
  fs.writeFileSync('[LOCAL_PATH]', buf);
  console.log('OK');
}).catch(e => { console.error(e); process.exit(1); });

        LevelFormat, Header, Footer, PageBreak } = require('docx');

const ORANGE_BG = "FFF3E0";
const ORANGE = "BF360C";

const b = { style: BorderStyle.SINGLE, size: 1, color: "CCCCCC" };
const borders = { top: b, bottom: b, left: b, right: b };

});

  spacing: { before: 40, after: 80 },
  children: [new TextRun({ text: t, size: 22, font: "Arial", color: GRAY, ...opts })]
});

    }),
    ...rows.slice(1).map((row, ri) => new TableRow({
      children: row.map((t, i) => new TableCell({
        borders,
        width: { size: widths[i], type: WidthType.DXA },
        shading: { fill: ri % 2 === 0 ? LIGHT : "FFFFFF", type: ShadingType.CLEAR },
        margins: { top: 80, bottom: 80, left: 120, right: 120 },
        children: [new Paragraph({ children: [new TextRun({ text: t, size: 20, font: "Arial", color: GRAY })] })]
      }))
    }))
  ]
});

});

Sí, cambiemos a `qwen2.5:1.5b` — 1 GB, responde en segundos en CPU. Primero descárgalo:

```powershell
ollama pull qwen2.5:1.5b
```

Cuando termine actualiza el perfil de PowerShell:

```powershell
notepad $PROFILE
```

Cambia `qwen3.5:latest` por `qwen2.5:1.5b` en la línea de python. Guarda y corre:

```powershell
. $PROFILE
claw
```

Y actualizo el bat también para que use ese modelo:
```
This block is not supported on your current device yet.
```


Descarga ese bat y reemplázalo:

```powershell
Copy-Item "$env:USERPROFILE\Downloads\claw.bat" "$env:USERPROFILE\OneDrive\Desktop\claw.bat" -Force
```

Con `qwen2.5:1.5b` debería responder en 10-20 segundos en vez de 3-4 minutos. La calidad baja un poco pero para estudiar para el [REDACTED_INFRASTRUCTURE] es más que suficiente.

input.command:
cat > [LOCAL_PATH] << 'EOF'
@echo off
chcp 65001 > nul 2>&1
set PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8
title Claw - Asistente IA
cd /d "[LOCAL_PATH] (2)\claw_completo"
set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=ollama

REM Liberar RAM antes de arrancar
taskkill /F /IM RobloxPlayerBeta.exe 2>nul
taskkill /F /IM Notion.exe 2>nul
taskkill /F /IM chrome.exe 2>nul
ollama stop qwen3.5:latest 2>nul
timeout /t 2 > nul

echo Iniciando Claw...
"[LOCAL_PATH]" clawspring.py --model ollama/qwen2.5:1.5b
if errorlevel 1 pause
EOF
echo OK

Listo. El documento tiene las 4 fases completas con todo lo que necesita el próximo Claude:

**Fase 1 — COMPLETADA:** base operativa, bat funcionando, 13 bugs corregidos, archivos clave con rutas exactas.

**Fase 2 — EN PROGRESO:** [REDACTED_INFRASTRUCTURE] (NO Telegram — fue hackeado), Whisper para clases del grupo 500, voz en vivo.

**Fase 3 — PENDIENTE:** navegador con Playwright, asistente [REDACTED_INFRASTRUCTURE] personalizado, [REDACTED_INFRASTRUCTURE] autónomas.

**Fase 4 — POST [REDACTED_INFRASTRUCTURE]:** GPU dedicada, API de Anthropic, Jarvis completo con control total del PC.

Cada fase tiene criterios de éxito claros y lo que NO se debe hacer. Guárdalo junto con los otros informes para dárselo al próximo Claude.

const { Document, Packer, Paragraph, TextRun, Table, TableRow, TableCell,
        AlignmentType, HeadingLevel, BorderStyle, WidthType, ShadingType,
        LevelFormat, PageBreak } = require('docx');
const fs = require('fs');

const BLUE = "1F4E79";
const ACCENT = "2E75B6";
const LIGHT = "EBF3FB";
const GREEN = "1B5E20";
const GREEN_BG = "E8F5E9";
const ORANGE = "BF360C";
const ORANGE_BG = "FFF3E0";
const PURPLE = "4A148C";
const PURPLE_BG = "F3E5F5";
const GRAY_BG = "F5F5F5";
const GRAY = "424242";

const b = { style: BorderStyle.SINGLE, size: 1, color: "CCCCCC" };
const borders = { top: b, bottom: b, left: b, right: b };

const h1 = (t, color=BLUE) => new Paragraph({
  heading: HeadingLevel.HEADING_1,
  spacing: { before: 320, after: 120 },
  border: { bottom: { style: BorderStyle.SINGLE, size: 8, color: ACCENT, space: 4 } },
  children: [new TextRun({ text: t, bold: true, size: 30, color, font: "Arial" })]
});

const h2 = t => new Paragraph({
  heading: HeadingLevel.HEADING_2,
  spacing: { before: 200, after: 80 },
  children: [new TextRun({ text: t, bold: true, size: 24, color: ACCENT, font: "Arial" })]
});

const p = (t, opts={}) => new Paragraph({
  spacing: { before: 40, after: 80 },
  children: [new TextRun({ text: t, size: 22, font: "Arial", color: GRAY, ...opts })]
});

const bullet = t => new Paragraph({
  numbering: { reference: "b", level: 0 },
  spacing: { before: 40, after: 40 },
  children: [new TextRun({ text: t, size: 22, font: "Arial", color: GRAY })]
});

const code = t => new Paragraph({
  spacing: { before: 20, after: 20 },
  shading: { fill: "F5F5F5", type: ShadingType.CLEAR },
  indent: { left: 360 },
  children: [new TextRun({ text: t, size: 18, font: "Courier New", color: "1A237E" })]
});

const sp = () => new Paragraph({ spacing: { after: 80 }, children: [new TextRun("")] });
const pb = () => new Paragraph({ children: [new PageBreak()] });

const box = (title, content, bg, tc) => new Table({
  width: { size: 9360, type: WidthType.DXA },
  columnWidths: [9360],
  rows: [new TableRow({ children: [new TableCell({
    borders,
    width: { size: 9360, type: WidthType.DXA },
    shading: { fill: bg, type: ShadingType.CLEAR },
    margins: { top: 100, bottom: 100, left: 180, right: 180 },
    children: [
      new Paragraph({ spacing: { after: 60 }, children: [new TextRun({ text: title, bold: true, size: 22, font: "Arial", color: tc })] }),
      ...(content ? [new Paragraph({ spacing: { after: 0 }, children: [new TextRun({ text: content, size: 20, font: "Arial", color: GRAY })] })] : [])
    ]
  })]})],
});

const tbl = (rows, widths) => new Table({
  width: { size: 9360, type: WidthType.DXA },
  columnWidths: widths,
  rows: [
    new TableRow({ tableHeader: true, children: rows[0].map((t, i) => new TableCell({
      borders, width: { size: widths[i], type: WidthType.DXA },
      shading: { fill: ACCENT, type: ShadingType.CLEAR },
      margins: { top: 80, bottom: 80, left: 120, right: 120 },
      children: [new Paragraph({ children: [new TextRun({ text: t, bold: true, size: 20, font: "Arial", color: "FFFFFF" })] })]
    }))]),
    ...rows.slice(1).map((row, ri) => new TableRow({ children: row.map((t, i) => new TableCell({
      borders, width: { size: widths[i], type: WidthType.DXA },
      shading: { fill: ri % 2 === 0 ? LIGHT : "FFFFFF", type: ShadingType.CLEAR },
      margins: { top: 80, bottom: 80, left: 120, right: 120 },
      children: [new Paragraph({ children: [new TextRun({ text: t, size: 20, font: "Arial", color: GRAY })] })]
    }))}))]
});

const doc = new Document({
  numbering: { config: [{ reference: "b", levels: [{ level: 0, format: LevelFormat.BULLET, text: "\u2022",
    alignment: AlignmentType.LEFT, style: { paragraph: { indent: { left: 540, hanging: 260 } } } }] }] },
  styles: {
    default: { document: { run: { font: "Arial", size: 22, color: GRAY } } },
    paragraphStyles: [
      { id: "Heading1", name: "Heading 1", basedOn: "Normal", next: "Normal", quickFormat: true,
        run: { size: 30, bold: true, font: "Arial", color: BLUE }, paragraph: { spacing: { before: 320, after: 120 }, outlineLevel: 0 } },
      { id: "Heading2", name: "Heading 2", basedOn: "Normal", next: "Normal", quickFormat: true,
        run: { size: 24, bold: true, font: "Arial", color: ACCENT }, paragraph: { spacing: { before: 200, after: 80 }, outlineLevel: 1 } },
    ]
  },
  sections: [{
    properties: { page: { size: { width: 12240, height: 15840 }, margin: { top: 1440, right: 1080, bottom: 1440, left: 1080 } } },
    children: [

      // PORTADA
      new Paragraph({ alignment: AlignmentType.CENTER, spacing: { after: 80 },
        children: [new TextRun({ text: "PROYECTO CLAW", size: 52, bold: true, font: "Arial", color: BLUE })] }),
      new Paragraph({ alignment: AlignmentType.CENTER, spacing: { after: 60 },
        children: [new TextRun({ text: "Hoja de Ruta Completa — Fases 1 a 4", size: 32, font: "Arial", color: ACCENT })] }),
      new Paragraph({ alignment: AlignmentType.CENTER, spacing: { after: 40 },

      new Paragraph({ alignment: AlignmentType.CENTER,

  columnWidths: [9360],
  rows: [new TableRow({ children: [new TableCell({
    borders,
    width: { size: 9360, type: WidthType.DXA },
    shading: { fill: bg, type: ShadingType.CLEAR },
    margins: { top: 100, bottom: 100, left: 180, right: 180 },
    children: [
      new Paragraph({ spacing: { after: 60 }, children: [new TextRun({ text: title, bold: true, size: 22, font: "Arial", color: tc })] }),
      ...(content ? [new Paragraph({ spacing: { after: 0 }, children: [new TextRun({ text: content, size: 20, font: "Arial", color: GRAY })] })] : [])
    ]
  })]})],
});

const tbl = (rows, widths) => new Table({
  width: { size: 9360, type: WidthType.DXA },
  columnWidths: widths,
  rows: [
    new TableRow({ tableHeader: true, children: rows[0].map((t, i) => new TableCell({
      borders, width: { size: widths[i], type: WidthType.DXA },
      shading: { fill: ACCENT, type: ShadingType.CLEAR },
      margins: { top: 80, bottom: 80, left: 120, right: 120 },
      children: [new Paragraph({ children: [new TextRun({ text: t, bold: true, size: 20, font: "Arial", color: "FFFFFF" })] })]
    }))]),
    ...rows.slice(1).map((row, ri) => new TableRow({ children: row.map((t, i) => new TableCell({
      borders, width: { size: widths[i], type: WidthType.DXA },
      shading: { fill: ri % 2 === 0 ? LIGHT : "FFFFFF", type: ShadingType.CLEAR },
      margins: { top: 80, bottom: 80, left: 120, right: 120 },
      children: [new Paragraph({ children: [new TextRun({ text: t, size: 20, font: "Arial", color: GRAY })] })]
    }))}))]
});

const doc = new Document({

Packer.toBuffer(doc).then(buf => {
  fs.writeFileSync('[LOCAL_PATH]', buf);
  console.log('OK');
}).catch(e => { console.error(e); process.exit(1); });

python3 << 'EOF'
with open('[LOCAL_PATH]') as f:
    c = f.read()

old = """const tbl = (rows, widths) => new Table({
  width: { size: 9360, type: WidthType.DXA },
  columnWidths: widths,
  rows: [
    new TableRow({ tableHeader: true, children: rows[0].map((t, i) => new TableCell({
      borders, width: { size: widths[i], type: WidthType.DXA },
      shading: { fill: ACCENT, type: ShadingType.CLEAR },
      margins: { top: 80, bottom: 80, left: 120, right: 120 },
      children: [new Paragraph({ children: [new TextRun({ text: t, bold: true, size: 20, font: "Arial", color: "FFFFFF" })] })]
    }))])
  ),
  ...rows.slice(1).map((row, ri) => new TableRow({ children: row.map((t, i) => new TableCell({
      borders, width: { size: widths[i], type: WidthType.DXA },
      shading: { fill: ri % 2 === 0 ? LIGHT : "FFFFFF", type: ShadingType.CLEAR },
      margins: { top: 80, bottom: 80, left: 120, right: 120 },
      children: [new Paragraph({ children: [new TextRun({ text: t, size: 20, font: "Arial", color: GRAY })] })]
    }))}))\n  ]\n});"""

new = """const tbl = (rows, widths) => new Table({
  width: { size: 9360, type: WidthType.DXA },
  columnWidths: widths,
  rows: rows.map((row, ri) => new TableRow({
    tableHeader: ri === 0,
    children: row.map((t, ci) => new TableCell({
      borders,
      width: { size: widths[ci], type: WidthType.DXA },
      shading: { fill: ri === 0 ? ACCENT : (ri % 2 === 1 ? LIGHT : "FFFFFF"), type: ShadingType.CLEAR },
      margins: { top: 80, bottom: 80, left: 120, right: 120 },
      children: [new Paragraph({ children: [new TextRun({ text: t, bold: ri === 0, size: 20, font: "Arial", color: ri === 0 ? "FFFFFF" : GRAY })] })]
    }))
  }))
});"""

c = c.replace(old, new, 1)
with open('[LOCAL_PATH]', 'w') as f:
    f.write(c)

import subprocess
r = subprocess.run(['node', '--check', '[LOCAL_PATH]'], capture_output=True, text=True)
print("SYNTAX:", "OK" if not r.returncode else r.stderr[:300])
EOF

content.text:
1	---
     2	name: docx
     3	description: "Use this skill whenever the user wants to create, read, edit, or manipulate Word documents (.docx files). Triggers include: any mention of 'Word doc', 'word document', '.docx', or requests to produce professional documents with formatting like tables of contents, headings, page numbers, or letterheads. Also use when extracting or reorganizing content from .docx files, inserting or replacing images in documents, performing find-and-replace in Word files, working with tracked changes or comments, or converting content into a polished Word document. If the user asks for a 'report', 'memo', 'letter', 'template', or similar deliverable as a Word or .docx file, use this skill. Do NOT use for PDFs, spreadsheets, Google Docs, or general coding tasks unrelated to document generation."
     4	license: Proprietary. LICENSE.txt has complete terms
     5	---
     6	
     7	# DOCX creation, editing, and analysis
     8	
     9	## Overview
    10	
    11	A .docx file is a ZIP archive containing XML files.
    12	
    13	## Quick Reference
    14	
    15	| Task | Approach |
    16	|------|----------|
    17	| Read/analyze content | `extract-text`, or unpack for raw XML |
    18	| Create new document | Use `docx-js` - see Creating New Documents below |
    19	| Edit existing document | Unpack → edit XML → repack - see Editing Existing Documents below |
    20	
    21	### Converting .doc to .docx
    22	
    23	Legacy `.doc` files must be converted before editing:
    24	
    25	```bash
    26	python scripts/office/soffice.py --headless --convert-to docx document.doc
    27	```
    28	
    29	### Reading Content
    30	
    31	```bash
    32	# Text extraction as markdown
    33	extract-text document.docx
    34	
    35	# Show tracked changes instead of accepting them
    36	pandoc --track-changes=all document.docx -o output.md
    37	
    38	# Raw XML access
    39	python scripts/office/unpack.py document.docx unpacked/
    40	```
    41	
    42	### Converting to Images
    43	
    44	```bash
    45	python scripts/office/soffice.py --headless --convert-to pdf document.docx
    46	pdftoppm -jpeg -r 150 document.pdf page
    47	```
    48	
    49	### Accepting Tracked Changes
    50	
    51	To produce a clean document with all tracked changes accepted (requires LibreOffice):
    52	
    53	```bash
    54	python scripts/accept_changes.py input.docx output.docx
    55	```
    56	
    57	---
    58	
    59	## Creating New Documents
    60	
    61	Generate .docx files with JavaScript, then validate. Install: `npm install -g docx`
    62	
    63	### Setup
    64	```javascript
    65	const { Document, Packer, Paragraph, TextRun, Table, TableRow, TableCell, ImageRun,
    66	        Header, Footer, AlignmentType, PageOrientation, LevelFormat, ExternalHyperlink,
    67	        InternalHyperlink, Bookmark, FootnoteReferenceRun, PositionalTab,
    68	        PositionalTabAlignment, PositionalTabRelativeTo, PositionalTabLeader,
    69	        TabStopType, TabStopPosition, Column, SectionType,
    70	        TableOfContents, HeadingLevel, BorderStyle, WidthType, ShadingType,
    71	        VerticalAlign, PageNumber, PageBreak } = require('docx');
    72	
    73	const doc = new Document({ sections: [{ children: [/* content */] }] });
    74	Packer.toBuffer(doc).then(buffer => fs.writeFileSync("doc.docx", buffer));
    75	```
    76	
    77	### Validation
    78	After creating the file, validate it. If validation fails, unpack, fix the XML, and repack.
    79	```bash
    80	python scripts/office/validate.py doc.docx
    81	```
    82	
    83	### Page Size
    84	
    85	```javascript
    86	// CRITICAL: docx-js defaults to A4, not US Letter
    87	// Always set page size explicitly for consistent results
    88	sections: [{
    89	  properties: {
    90	    page: {
    91	      size: {
    92	        width: 12240,   // 8.5 inches in DXA
    93	        height: 15840   // 11 inches in DXA
    94	      },
    95	      margin: { top: 1440, right: 1440, bottom: 1440, left: 1440 } // 1 inch margins
    96	    }
    97	  },
    98	  children: [/* content */]
    99	}]
   100	```
   101	
   102	**Common page sizes (DXA units, 1440 DXA = 1 inch):**
   103	
   104	| Paper | Width | Height | Content Width (1" margins) |
   105	|-------|-------|--------|---------------------------|
   106	| US Letter | 12,240 | 15,840 | 9,360 |
   107	| A4 (default) | 11,906 | 16,838 | 9,026 |
   108	
   109	**Landscape orientation:** docx-js swaps width/height internally, so pass portrait dimensions and let it handle the swap:
   110	```javascript
   111	size: {
   112	  width: 12240,   // Pass SHORT edge as width
   113	  height: 15840,  // Pass LONG edge as height
   114	  orientation: PageOrientation.LANDSCAPE  // docx-js swaps them in the XML
   115	},
   116	// Content width = 15840 - left margin - right margin (uses the long edge)
   117	```
   118	
   119	### Styles (Override Built-in Headings)
   120	
   121	Use Arial as the default font (universally supported). Keep titles black for readability.
   122	
   123	```javascript
   124	const doc = new Document({
   125	  styles: {
   126	    default: { document: { run: { font: "Arial", size: 24 } } }, // 12pt default
   127	    paragraphStyles: [
   128	      // IMPORTANT: Use exact IDs to override built-in styles
   129	      { id: "Heading1", name: "Heading 1", basedOn: "Normal", next: "Normal", quickFormat: true,
   130	        run: { size: 32, bold: true, font: "Arial" },
   131	        paragraph: { spacing: { before: 240, after: 240 }, outlineLevel: 0 } }, // outlineLevel required for TOC
   132	      { id: "Heading2", name: "Heading 2", basedOn: "Normal", next: "Normal", quickFormat: true,
   133	        run: { size: 28, bold: true, font: "Arial" },
   134	        paragraph: { spacing: { before: 180, after: 180 }, outlineLevel: 1 } },
   135	    ]
   136	  },
   137	  sections: [{
   138	    children: [
   139	      new Paragraph({ heading: HeadingLevel.HEADING_1, children: [new TextRun("Title")] }),
   140	    ]
   141	  }]
   142	});
   143	```
   144	
   145	### Lists (NEVER use unicode bullets)
   146	
   147	```javascript
   148	// ❌ WRONG - never manually insert bullet characters
   149	new Paragraph({ children: [new TextRun("• Item")] })  // BAD
   150	new Paragraph({ children: [new TextRun("\u2022 Item")] })  // BAD
   151	
   152	// ✅ CORRECT - use numbering config with LevelFormat.BULLET
   153	const doc = new Document({
   154	  numbering: {
   155	    config: [
   156	      { reference: "bullets",
   157	        levels: [{ level: 0, format: LevelFormat.BULLET, text: "•", alignment: AlignmentType.LEFT,
   158	          style: { paragraph: { indent: { left: 720, hanging: 360 } } } }] },
   159	      { reference: "numbers",
   160	        levels: [{ level: 0, format: LevelFormat.DECIMAL, text: "%1.", alignment: AlignmentType.LEFT,
   161	          style: { paragraph: { indent: { left: 720, hanging: 360 } } } }] },
   162	    ]
   163	  },
   164	  sections: [{
   165	    children: [
   166	      new Paragraph({ numbering: { reference: "bullets", level: 0 },
   167	        children: [new TextRun("Bullet item")] }),
   168	      new Paragraph({ numbering: { reference: "numbers", level: 0 },
   169	        children: [new TextRun("Numbered item")] }),
   170	    ]
   171	  }]
   172	});
   173	
   174	// ⚠️ Each reference creates INDEPENDENT numbering
   175	// Same reference = continues (1,2,3 then 4,5,6)
   176	// Different reference = restarts (1,2,3 then 1,2,3)
   177	```
   178	
   179	### Tables
   180	
   181	**CRITICAL: Tables need dual widths** - set both `columnWidths` on the table AND `width` on each cell. Without both, tables render incorrectly on some platforms.
   182	
   183	```javascript
   184	// CRITICAL: Always set table width for consistent rendering
   185	// CRITICAL: Use ShadingType.CLEAR (not SOLID) to prevent black backgrounds
   186	const border = { style: BorderStyle.SINGLE, size: 1, color: "CCCCCC" };
   187	const borders = { top: border, bottom: border, left: border, right: border };
   188	
   189	new Table({
   190	  width: { size: 9360, type: WidthType.DXA }, // Always use DXA (percentages break in Google Docs)
   191	  columnWidths: [4680, 4680], // Must sum to table width (DXA: 1440 = 1 inch)
   192	  rows: [
   193	    new TableRow({
   194	      children: [
   195	        new TableCell({
   196	          borders,
   197	          width: { size: 4680, type: WidthType.DXA }, // Also set on each cell
   198	          shading: { fill: "D5E8F0", type: ShadingType.CLEAR }, // CLEAR not SOLID
   199	          margins: { top: 80, bottom: 80, left: 120, right: 120 }, // Cell padding (internal, not added to width)
   200	          children: [new Paragraph({ children: [new TextRun("Cell")] })]
   201	        })
   202	      ]
   203	    })
   204	  ]
   205	})
   206	```
   207	
   208	**Table width calculation:**
   209	
   210	Always use `WidthType.DXA` — `WidthType.PERCENTAGE` breaks in Google Docs.
   211	
   212	```javascript
   213	// Table width = sum of columnWidths = content width
   214	// US Letter with 1" margins: 12240 - 2880 = 9360 DXA
   215	width: { size: 9360, type: WidthType.DXA },
	< truncated lines 216-378 >
   379	```
   380	
   381	### Critical Rules for docx-js
   382	
   383	- **Set page size explicitly** - docx-js defaults to A4; use US Letter (12240 x 15840 DXA) for US documents
   384	- **Landscape: pass portrait dimensions** - docx-js swaps width/height internally; pass short edge as `width`, long edge as `height`, and set `orientation: PageOrientation.LANDSCAPE`
   385	- **Never use `\n`** - use separate Paragraph elements
   386	- **Never use unicode bullets** - use `LevelFormat.BULLET` with numbering config
   387	- **PageBreak must be in Paragraph** - standalone creates invalid XML
   388	- **ImageRun requires `type`** - always specify png/jpg/etc
   389	- **Always set table `width` with DXA** - never use `WidthType.PERCENTAGE` (breaks in Google Docs)
   390	- **Tables need dual widths** - `columnWidths` array AND cell `width`, both must match
   391	- **Table width = sum of columnWidths** - for DXA, ensure they add up exactly
   392	- **Always add cell margins** - use `margins: { top: 80, bottom: 80, left: 120, right: 120 }` for readable padding
   393	- **Use `ShadingType.CLEAR`** - never SOLID for table shading
   394	- **Never use tables as dividers/rules** - cells have minimum height and render as empty boxes (including in headers/footers); use `border: { bottom: { style: BorderStyle.SINGLE, size: 6, color: "2E75B6", space: 1 } }` on a Paragraph instead. For two-column footers, use tab stops (see Tab Stops section), not tables
   395	- **TOC requires HeadingLevel only** - no custom styles on heading paragraphs
   396	- **Override built-in styles** - use exact IDs: "Heading1", "Heading2", etc.
   397	- **Include `outlineLevel`** - required for TOC (0 for H1, 1 for H2, etc.)
   398	
   399	---
   400	
   401	## Editing Existing Documents
   402	
   403	**Follow all 3 steps in order.**
   404	
   405	### Step 1: Unpack
   406	```bash
   407	python scripts/office/unpack.py document.docx unpacked/
   408	```
   409	Extracts XML, pretty-prints, merges adjacent runs, and converts smart quotes to XML entities (`“` etc.) so they survive editing. Use `--merge-runs false` to skip run merging.
   410	
   411	### Step 2: Edit XML
   412	
   413	Edit files in `unpacked/word/`. See XML Reference below for patterns.
   414	
   415	**Use "Claude" as the author** for tracked changes and comments, unless the user explicitly requests use of a different name.
   416	
   417	**Use the Edit tool directly for string replacement. Do not write Python scripts.** Scripts introduce unnecessary complexity. The Edit tool shows exactly what is being replaced.
   418	
   419	**CRITICAL: Use smart quotes for new content.** When adding text with apostrophes or quotes, use XML entities to produce smart quotes:
   420	```xml
   421	<!-- Use these entities for professional typography -->
   422	<w:t>Here’s a quote: “Hello”</w:t>
   423	```
   424	| Entity | Character |
   425	|--------|-----------|
   426	| `‘` | ‘ (left single) |
   427	| `’` | ’ (right single / apostrophe) |
   428	| `“` | “ (left double) |
   429	| `”` | ” (right double) |
   430	
   431	**Adding comments:** Use `comment.py` to handle boilerplate across multiple XML files (text must be pre-escaped XML):
   432	```bash
   433	python scripts/comment.py unpacked/ 0 "Comment text with & and ’"
   434	python scripts/comment.py unpacked/ 1 "Reply text" --parent 0  # reply to comment 0
   435	python scripts/comment.py unpacked/ 0 "Text" --author "Custom Author"  # custom author name
   436	```
   437	Then add markers to document.xml (see Comments in XML Reference).
   438	
   439	### Step 3: Pack
   440	```bash
   441	python scripts/office/pack.py unpacked/ output.docx --original document.docx
   442	```
   443	Validates with auto-repair, condenses XML, and creates DOCX. Use `--validate false` to skip.
   444	
   445	**Auto-repair will fix:**
   446	- `durableId` >= 0x7FFFFFFF (regenerates valid ID)
   447	- Missing `xml:space="preserve"` on `<w:t>` with whitespace
   448	
   449	**Auto-repair won't fix:**
   450	- Malformed XML, invalid element nesting, missing relationships, schema violations
   451	
   452	### Common Pitfalls
   453	
   454	- **Replace entire `<w:r>` elements**: When adding tracked changes, replace the whole `<w:r>...</w:r>` block with `<w:del>...<w:ins>...` as siblings. Don't inject tracked change tags inside a run.
   455	- **Preserve `<w:rPr>` formatting**: Copy the original run's `<w:rPr>` block into your tracked change runs to maintain bold, font size, etc.
   456	
   457	---
   458	
   459	## XML Reference
   460	
   461	### Schema Compliance
   462	
   463	- **Element order in `<w:pPr>`**: `<w:pStyle>`, `<w:numPr>`, `<w:spacing>`, `<w:ind>`, `<w:jc>`, `<w:rPr>` last
   464	- **Whitespace**: Add `xml:space="preserve"` to `<w:t>` with leading/trailing spaces
   465	- **RSIDs**: Must be 8-digit hex (e.g., `00AB1234`)
   466	
   467	### Tracked Changes
   468	
   469	**Insertion:**
   470	```xml
   471	<w:ins w:id="1" w:author="Claude" w:date="2025-01-01T00:00:00Z">
   472	  <w:r><w:t>inserted text</w:t></w:r>
   473	</w:ins>
   474	```
   475	
   476	**Deletion:**
   477	```xml
   478	<w:del w:id="2" w:author="Claude" w:date="2025-01-01T00:00:00Z">
   479	  <w:r><w:delText>deleted text</w:delText></w:r>
   480	</w:del>
   481	```
   482	
   483	**Inside `<w:del>`**: Use `<w:delText>` instead of `<w:t>`, and `<w:delInstrText>` instead of `<w:instrText>`.
   484	
   485	**Minimal edits** - only mark what changes:
   486	```xml
   487	<!-- Change "30 days" to "60 days" -->
   488	<w:r><w:t>The term is </w:t></w:r>
   489	<w:del w:id="1" w:author="Claude" w:date="...">
   490	  <w:r><w:delText>30</w:delText></w:r>
   491	</w:del>
   492	<w:ins w:id="2" w:author="Claude" w:date="...">
   493	  <w:r><w:t>60</w:t></w:r>
   494	</w:ins>
   495	<w:r><w:t> days.</w:t></w:r>
   496	```
   497	
   498	**Deleting entire paragraphs/list items** - when removing ALL content from a paragraph, also mark the paragraph mark as deleted so it merges with the next paragraph. Add `<w:del/>` inside `<w:pPr><w:rPr>`:
   499	```xml
   500	<w:p>
   501	  <w:pPr>
   502	    <w:numPr>...</w:numPr>  <!-- list numbering if present -->
   503	    <w:rPr>
   504	      <w:del w:id="1" w:author="Claude" w:date="2025-01-01T00:00:00Z"/>
   505	    </w:rPr>
   506	  </w:pPr>
   507	  <w:del w:id="2" w:author="Claude" w:date="2025-01-01T00:00:00Z">
   508	    <w:r><w:delText>Entire paragraph content being deleted...</w:delText></w:r>
   509	  </w:del>
   510	</w:p>
   511	```
   512	Without the `<w:del/>` in `<w:pPr><w:rPr>`, accepting changes leaves an empty paragraph/list item.
   513	
   514	**Rejecting another author's insertion** - nest deletion inside their insertion:
   515	```xml
   516	<w:ins w:author="Jane" w:id="5">
   517	  <w:del w:author="Claude" w:id="10">
   518	    <w:r><w:delText>their inserted text</w:delText></w:r>
   519	  </w:del>
   520	</w:ins>
   521	```
   522	
   523	**Restoring another author's deletion** - add insertion after (don't modify their deletion):
   524	```xml
   525	<w:del w:author="Jane" w:id="5">
   526	  <w:r><w:delText>deleted text</w:delText></w:r>
   527	</w:del>
   528	<w:ins w:author="Claude" w:id="10">
   529	  <w:r><w:t>deleted text</w:t></w:r>
   530	</w:ins>
   531	```
   532	
   533	### Comments
   534	
   535	After running `comment.py` (see Step 2), add markers to document.xml. For replies, use `--parent` flag and nest markers inside the parent's.
   536	
   537	**CRITICAL: `<w:commentRangeStart>` and `<w:commentRangeEnd>` are siblings of `<w:r>`, never inside `<w:r>`.**
   538	
   539	```xml
   540	<!-- Comment markers are direct children of w:p, never inside w:r -->
   541	<w:commentRangeStart w:id="0"/>
   542	<w:del w:id="1" w:author="Claude" w:date="2025-01-01T00:00:00Z">
   543	  <w:r><w:delText>deleted</w:delText></w:r>
   544	</w:del>
   545	<w:r><w:t> more text</w:t></w:r>
   546	<w:commentRangeEnd w:id="0"/>
   547	<w:r><w:rPr><w:rStyle w:val="CommentReference"/></w:rPr><w:commentReference w:id="0"/></w:r>
   548	
   549	<!-- Comment 0 with reply 1 nested inside -->
   550	<w:commentRangeStart w:id="0"/>
   551	  <w:commentRangeStart w:id="1"/>
   552	  <w:r><w:t>text</w:t></w:r>
   553	  <w:commentRangeEnd w:id="1"/>
   554	<w:commentRangeEnd w:id="0"/>
   555	<w:r><w:rPr><w:rStyle w:val="CommentReference"/></w:rPr><w:commentReference w:id="0"/></w:r>
   556	<w:r><w:rPr><w:rStyle w:val="CommentReference"/></w:rPr><w:commentReference w:id="1"/></w:r>
   557	```
   558	
   559	### Images
   560	
   561	1. Add image file to `word/media/`
   562	2. Add relationship to `word/_rels/document.xml.rels`:
   563	```xml
   564	<Relationship Id="rId5" Type=".../image" Target="media/image1.png"/>
   565	```
   566	3. Add content type to `[Content_Types].xml`:
   567	```xml
   568	<Default Extension="png" ContentType="image/png"/>
   569	```
   570	4. Reference in document.xml:
   571	```xml
   572	<w:drawing>
   573	  <wp:inline>
   574	    <wp:extent cx="914400" cy="914400"/>  <!-- EMUs: 914400 = 1 inch -->
   575	    <a:graphic>
   576	      <a:graphicData uri=".../picture">
   577	        <pic:pic>
   578	          <pic:blipFill><a:blip r:embed="rId5"/></pic:blipFill>
   579	        </pic:pic>
   580	      </a:graphicData>
   581	    </a:graphic>
   582	  </wp:inline>
   583	</w:drawing>
   584	```
   585	
   586	---
   587	
   588	## Dependencies
   589	
   590	- **pandoc**: Text extraction
   591	- **docx**: `npm install -g docx` (new documents)
   592	- **LibreOffice**: PDF conversion (auto-configured for sandboxed environments via `scripts/office/soffice.py`)
   593	- **Poppler**: `pdftoppm` for images
   594

content.thinking: Now I have the skill. Let me create a comprehensive single document that includes everything - all phases, all bugs, hardware info, the AIs involved (Gems, Tails, Metal Sonic from Gemini), resources like Ollama, [REDACTED_INFRASTRUCTURE]-web.js, and the protocol for future Claudes.

cat > [LOCAL_PATH] << 'JSEOF'
const { Document, Packer, Paragraph, TextRun, Table, TableRow, TableCell,
        AlignmentType, HeadingLevel, BorderStyle, WidthType, ShadingType,
        LevelFormat, Header, Footer, TabStopType, TabStopPosition, PageBreak } = require('docx');
const fs = require('fs');

// ─── COLORES ───
const BLUE    = "1F4E79";
const ACCENT  = "2E75B6";
const LIGHT   = "EBF3FB";
const VLIGHT  = "F4F9FF";
const GREEN   = "1B5E20";
const GREENBG = "E8F5E9";
const ORANGE  = "BF360C";
const ORANGBG = "FFF3E0";
const RED     = "B71C1C";
const REDBG   = "FFEBEE";
const PURP    = "4A148C";
const PURPBG  = "F3E5F5";
const TEAL    = "004D40";
const TEALBG  = "E0F2F1";
const GRAY    = "424242";
const LGRAY   = "757575";

// ─── BORDES ───
const bd = { style: BorderStyle.SINGLE, size: 1, color: "CCCCCC" };
const borders = { top: bd, bottom: bd, left: bd, right: bd };
const nb = { style: BorderStyle.NONE, size: 0, color: "FFFFFF" };
const noBorders = { top: nb, bottom: nb, left: nb, right: nb };

// ─── HELPERS ───
const sp = () => new Paragraph({ spacing: { after: 80 }, children: [new TextRun("")] });
const pb = () => new Paragraph({ children: [new PageBreak()] });

const h1 = (t, color=BLUE) => new Paragraph({
  heading: HeadingLevel.HEADING_1,
  spacing: { before: 360, after: 120 },
  border: { bottom: { style: BorderStyle.SINGLE, size: 8, color: ACCENT, space: 4 } },
  children: [new TextRun({ text: t, bold: true, size: 30, color, font: "Arial" })]
});

const h2 = (t, color=ACCENT) => new Paragraph({
  heading: HeadingLevel.HEADING_2,
  spacing: { before: 240, after: 80 },
  children: [new TextRun({ text: t, bold: true, size: 24, color, font: "Arial" })]
});

const h3 = (t) => new Paragraph({
  heading: HeadingLevel.HEADING_3,
  spacing: { before: 160, after: 60 },
  children: [new TextRun({ text: t, bold: true, size: 22, color: "2C6B9E", font: "Arial" })]
});

const p = (t, opts={}) => new Paragraph({
  spacing: { before: 40, after: 80 },
  children: [new TextRun({ text: t, size: 22, font: "Arial", color: GRAY, ...opts })]
});

const bl = (t) => new Paragraph({
  numbering: { reference: "bullets", level: 0 },
  spacing: { before: 40, after: 40 },
  children: [new TextRun({ text: t, size: 22, font: "Arial", color: GRAY })]
});

const cd = (t) => new Paragraph({
  spacing: { before: 20, after: 20 },
  shading: { fill: "F5F5F5", type: ShadingType.CLEAR },
  indent: { left: 360 },
  children: [new TextRun({ text: t, size: 18, font: "Courier New", color: "1A237E" })]
});

const box = (title, content, bg, tc) => new Table({
  width: { size: 9360, type: WidthType.DXA },
  columnWidths: [9360],
  rows: [new TableRow({ children: [new TableCell({
    borders,
    width: { size: 9360, type: WidthType.DXA },
    shading: { fill: bg, type: ShadingType.CLEAR },
    margins: { top: 120, bottom: 120, left: 200, right: 200 },
    children: [
      new Paragraph({ spacing: { after: content ? 60 : 0 }, children: [new TextRun({ text: title, bold: true, size: 22, font: "Arial", color: tc })] }),
      ...(content ? [new Paragraph({ spacing: { after: 0 }, children: [new TextRun({ text: content, size: 20, font: "Arial", color: GRAY })] })] : [])
    ]
  })]})],
});

const tbl = (rows, widths) => new Table({
  width: { size: 9360, type: WidthType.DXA },
  columnWidths: widths,
  rows: rows.map((row, ri) => new TableRow({
    tableHeader: ri === 0,
    children: row.map((t, ci) => new TableCell({
      borders,
      width: { size: widths[ci], type: WidthType.DXA },
      shading: { fill: ri === 0 ? ACCENT : (ri % 2 === 1 ? LIGHT : "FFFFFF"), type: ShadingType.CLEAR },
      margins: { top: 80, bottom: 80, left: 120, right: 120 },
      children: [new Paragraph({ children: [new TextRun({ text: t, bold: ri === 0, size: 20, font: "Arial", color: ri === 0 ? "FFFFFF" : GRAY })] })]
    }))
  }))
});

// ─── DOCUMENTO ───
const doc = new Document({
  numbering: {
    config: [
      { reference: "bullets", levels: [
        { level: 0, format: LevelFormat.BULLET, text: "\u2022", alignment: AlignmentType.LEFT,
          style: { paragraph: { indent: { left: 540, hanging: 260 } } } },
        { level: 1, format: LevelFormat.BULLET, text: "\u25E6", alignment: AlignmentType.LEFT,
          style: { paragraph: { indent: { left: 900, hanging: 260 } } } },
      ]},
      { reference: "nums", levels: [
        { level: 0, format: LevelFormat.DECIMAL, text: "%1.", alignment: AlignmentType.LEFT,
          style: { paragraph: { indent: { left: 540, hanging: 260 } } } },
      ]},
    ]
  },
  styles: {
    default: { document: { run: { font: "Arial", size: 22, color: GRAY } } },
    paragraphStyles: [
      { id: "Heading1", name: "Heading 1", basedOn: "Normal", next: "Normal", quickFormat: true,
        run: { size: 30, bold: true, font: "Arial", color: BLUE },
        paragraph: { spacing: { before: 360, after: 120 }, outlineLevel: 0 } },
      { id: "Heading2", name: "Heading 2", basedOn: "Normal", next: "Normal", quickFormat: true,
        run: { size: 24, bold: true, font: "Arial", color: ACCENT },
        paragraph: { spacing: { before: 240, after: 80 }, outlineLevel: 1 } },
      { id: "Heading3", name: "Heading 3", basedOn: "Normal", next: "Normal", quickFormat: true,
        run: { size: 22, bold: true, font: "Arial", color: "2C6B9E" },
        paragraph: { spacing: { before: 160, after: 60 }, outlineLevel: 2 } },
    ]
  },
  sections: [{
    properties: {
      page: { size: { width: 12240, height: 15840 }, margin: { top: 1440, right: 1080, bottom: 1440, left: 1080 } }
    },
    headers: { default: new Header({ children: [new Paragraph({
      border: { bottom: { style: BorderStyle.SINGLE, size: 4, color: ACCENT, space: 4 } },
      spacing: { after: 80 },
      children: [new TextRun({ text: "PROYECTO CLAW  —  Documento Maestro  |  [REDACTED_INFRASTRUCTURE] [REDACTED_INFRASTRUCTURE]  |  Colombia  |  Mayo 2026", size: 18, font: "Arial", color: ACCENT })]
    })]}) },
    footers: { default: new Footer({ children: [new Paragraph({
      border: { top: { style: BorderStyle.SINGLE, size: 4, color: ACCENT, space: 4 } },
      spacing: { before: 80 },
      children: [new TextRun({ text: "Proyecto Claw  —  Jarvis personal de [REDACTED_INFRASTRUCTURE]  |  Uso exclusivo del equipo del proyecto", size: 16, font: "Arial", color: LGRAY, italics: true })]
    })]}) },
    children: [

      // ══════════════════════════════════════════════
      // PORTADA
      // ══════════════════════════════════════════════
      ...Array(3).fill(sp()),
      new Paragraph({ alignment: AlignmentType.CENTER, spacing: { after: 60 },
        children: [new TextRun({ text: "PROYECTO CLAW", size: 60, bold: true, font: "Arial", color: BLUE })] }),
      new Paragraph({ alignment: AlignmentType.CENTER, spacing: { after: 60 },
        children: [new TextRun({ text: "Documento Maestro — Version 1.0", size: 30, font: "Arial", color: ACCENT })] }),
      new Paragraph({ alignment: AlignmentType.CENTER, spacing: { after: 40 },
        children: [new TextRun({ text: "Asistente de IA Personal de [REDACTED_INFRASTRUCTURE] [REDACTED_INFRASTRUCTURE]", size: 24, font: "Arial", color: LGRAY })] }),
      new Paragraph({ alignment: AlignmentType.CENTER,
        border: { bottom: { style: BorderStyle.SINGLE, size: 10, color: ACCENT, space: 10 } },
        spacing: { after: 240 }, children: [new TextRun(" ")] }),
      ...Array(2).fill(sp()),
      new Paragraph({ alignment: AlignmentType.CENTER, spacing: { after: 40 },
        children: [new TextRun({ text: "[REDACTED_INFRASTRUCTURE] [REDACTED_INFRASTRUCTURE]  |  Colombia  |  Mayo 2026", size: 22, font: "Arial", color: GRAY })] }),
      new Paragraph({ alignment: AlignmentType.CENTER, spacing: { after: 40 },
        children: [new TextRun({ text: "Compilado por: Claude (Anthropic)  +  Gemini Gems (Google)", size: 20, font: "Arial", color: LGRAY, italics: true })] }),
      ...Array(2).fill(sp()),
      box("Proposito de este documento",
        "Este es el documento central del Proyecto Claw. Contiene todo lo que cualquier IA — Claude, Gemini, o cualquier otro — " +
        "necesita saber para continuar el desarrollo sin romper lo que ya funciona. Incluye: historial de IAs colaboradoras, " +
        "estado de cada fase, bugs corregidos, hardware real del PC, rutas criticas, recursos externos, y directivas obligatorias.",
        LIGHT, ACCENT),

      pb(),

      // ══════════════════════════════════════════════
      // 1. EQUIPO DE IAs

      bl("Fusiono todos los parches de diferentes sesiones en archivos coherentes"),

      cd("client.on('ready', () => console.log('Claw [REDACTED_INFRASTRUCTURE] Bridge listo'));"),

{"language": "bash", "code": "cat > [LOCAL_PATH] << 'JSEOF'
const { Document, Packer, Paragraph, TextRun, Table, TableRow, TableCell,
        AlignmentType, HeadingLevel, BorderStyle, WidthType, ShadingType,
        LevelFormat, Header, Footer, TabStopType, TabStopPosition, PageBreak } = require('docx');
const fs = require('fs');

// ─── COLORES ───
const BLUE    = "1F4E79";
const ACCENT  = "2E75B6";
const LIGHT   = "EBF3FB";
const VLIGHT  = "F4F9FF";
const GREEN   = "1B5E20";
const GREENBG = "E8F5E9";
const ORANGE  = "BF360C";
const ORANGBG = "FFF3E0";
const RED     = "B71C1C";
const REDBG   = "FFEBEE";
const PURP    = "4A148C";
const PURPBG  = "F3E5F5";
const TEAL    = "004D40";
const TEALBG  = "E0F2F1";
const GRAY    = "424242";
const LGRAY   = "757575";

// ─── BORDES ───
const bd = { style: BorderStyle.SINGLE, size: 1, color: "CCCCCC" };
const borders = { top: bd, bottom: bd, left: bd, right: bd };
const nb = { style: BorderStyle.NONE, size: 0, color: "FFFFFF" };
const noBorders = { top: nb, bottom: nb, left: nb, right: nb };

// ─── HELPERS ───
const sp = () => new Paragraph({ spacing: { after: 80 }, children: [new TextRun("")] });
const pb = () => new Paragraph({ children: [new PageBreak()] });

const h1 = (t, color=BLUE) => new Paragraph({
  heading: HeadingLevel.HEADING_1,
  spacing: { before: 360, after: 120 },
  border: { bottom: { style: BorderStyle.SINGLE, size: 8, color: ACCENT, space: 4 } },
  children: [new TextRun({ text: t, bold: true, size: 30, color, font: "Arial" })]
});

const h2 = (t, color=ACCENT) => new Paragraph({
  heading: HeadingLevel.HEADING_2,
  spacing: { before: 240, after: 80 },
  children: [new TextRun({ text: t, bold: true, size: 24, color, font: "Arial" })]
});

const h3 = (t) => new Paragraph({
  heading: HeadingLevel.HEADING_3,
  spacing: { before: 160, after: 60 },
  children: [new TextRun({ text: t, bold: true, size: 22, color: "2C6B9E", font: "Arial" })]
});

const p = (t, opts={}) => new Paragraph({
  spacing: { before: 40, after: 80 },
  children: [new TextRun({ text: t, size: 22, font: "Arial", color: GRAY, ...opts })]
});

const bl = (t) => new Paragraph({
  numbering: { reference: "bullets", level: 0 },
  spacing: { before: 40, after: 40 },
  children: [new TextRun({ text: t, size: 22, font: "Arial", color: GRAY })]
});

const cd = (t) => new Paragraph({
  spacing: { before: 20, after: 20 },
  shading: { fill: "F5F5F5", type: ShadingType.CLEAR },
  indent: { left: 360 },
  children: [new TextRun({ text: t, size: 18, font: "Courier New", color: "1A237E" })]
});

const box = (title, content, bg, tc) => new Table({
  width: { size: 9360, type: WidthType.DXA },
  columnWidths: [9360],
  rows: [new TableRow({ children: [new TableCell({
    borders,
    width: { size: 9360, type: WidthType.DXA },
    shading: { fill: bg, type: ShadingType.CLEAR },
    margins: { top: 120, bottom: 120, left: 200, right: 200 },
    children: [
      new Paragraph({ spacing: { after: content ? 60 : 0 }, children: [new TextRun({ text: title, bold: true, size: 22, font: "Arial", color: tc })] }),
      ...(content ? [new Paragraph({ spacing: { after: 0 }, children: [new TextRun({ text: content, size: 20, font: "Arial", color: GRAY })] })] : [])
    ]
  })]})],
});

const tbl = (rows, widths) => new Table({
  width: { size: 9360, type: WidthType.DXA },
  columnWidths: widths,
  rows: rows.map((row, ri) => new TableRow({
    tableHeader: ri === 0,
    children: row.map((t, ci) => new TableCell({
      borders,
      width: { size: widths[ci], type: WidthType.DXA },
      shading: { fill: ri === 0 ? ACCENT : (ri % 2 === 1 ? LIGHT : "FFFFFF"), type: ShadingType.CLEAR },
      margins: { top: 80, bottom: 80, left: 120, right: 120 },
      children: [new Paragraph({ children: [new TextRun({ text: t, bold: ri === 0, size: 20, font: "Arial", color: ri === 0 ? "FFFFFF" : GRAY })] })]
    }))
  }))
});

// ─── DOCUMENTO ───
const doc = new Document({
  numbering: {
    config: [
      { reference: "bullets", levels: [
        { level: 0, format: LevelFormat.BULLET, text: "\u2022", alignment: AlignmentType.LEFT,
          style: { paragraph: { indent: { left: 540, hanging: 260 } } } },
        { level: 1, format: LevelFormat.BULLET, text: "\u25E6", alignment: AlignmentType.LEFT,
          style: { paragraph: { indent: { left: 900, hanging: 260 } } } },
      ]},
      { reference: "nums", levels: [
        { level: 0, format: LevelFormat.DECIMAL, text: "%1.", alignment: AlignmentType.LEFT,
          style: { paragraph: { indent: { left: 540, hanging: 260 } } } },
      ]},
    ]
  },
  styles: {
    default: { document: { run: { font: "Arial", size: 22, color: GRAY } } },
    paragraphStyles: [
      { id: "Heading1", name: "Heading 1", basedOn: "Normal", next: "Normal", quickFormat: true,
        run: { size: 30, bold: true, font: "Arial", color: BLUE },
        paragraph: { spacing: { before: 360, after: 120 }, outlineLevel: 0 } },
      { id: "Heading2", name: "Heading 2", basedOn: "Normal", next: "Normal", quickFormat: true,
        run: { size: 24, bold: true, font: "Arial", color: ACCENT },
        paragraph: { spacing: { before: 240, after: 80 }, outlineLevel: 1 } },

      p("Windows CMD no soporta Unicode en scripts .bat. Prohibido: emojis, tildes, enye, simbolos como === o ╔. Solo A-Z, 0-9, guiones y espacios."),
      p("Verificar con: file claw.bat — debe decir 'ASCII text', nunca 'UTF-8 text'."),
      sp(),

      h2("Directiva 4 — think DENTRO de options{}"),
      cd("# CORRECTO — dentro de options:"),
      cd("payload['options']['think'] = False"),
      cd(""),
      cd("# INCORRECTO — en la raiz (da HTTP 500):"),
      cd("payload['think'] = False"),
      sp(),

      h2("Directiva 5 — Rutas NO estandar de [REDACTED_INFRASTRUCTURE]"),
      tbl([
        ["Que", "Ruta correcta"],
        ["Python ejecutable", "[LOCAL_PATH]"],
        ["Escritorio", "[LOCAL_PATH]"],
        ["Documentos", "[LOCAL_PATH]"],
        ["Carpeta Claw", "[LOCAL_PATH] (2)\\claw_completo"],
        ["$PROFILE PowerShell", "[LOCAL_PATH]"],
      ], [3000, 6360]),
      sp(),

      h2("Directiva 6 — NO Telegram"),
      box("El Telegram de [REDACTED_INFRASTRUCTURE] fue hackeado. NO sugerir Telegram para nada. El bot de control remoto usa [REDACTED_INFRASTRUCTURE] via [REDACTED_INFRASTRUCTURE]-web.js.", REDBG, RED),
      sp(),

      h2("Directiva 7 — Verificacion antes de entregar codigo"),
      p("Antes de entregar cualquier archivo Python, verificar sintaxis:"),
      cd("python -m py_compile clawspring.py && echo OK"),
      cd("python -m py_compile providers.py && echo OK"),
      p("Si cualquiera falla, NO entregar el archivo hasta corregirlo."),
      sp(),

      h2("Directiva 8 — RAM minima para Qwen3.5"),
      p("Qwen3.5 necesita 6 GB libres para funcionar. Si el sistema tiene menos, usar qwen2.5:1.5b como fallback. Nunca sugerir modelos que no quepan en RAM."),
      tbl([
        ["RAM libre disponible", "Modelo a usar"],
        ["6 GB o mas", "ollama/qwen3.5:latest (modelo principal)"],
        ["2-5 GB", "ollama/qwen2.5:1.5b (modelo ligero)"],
        ["Menos de 2 GB", "Cerrar aplicaciones primero, luego usar qwen2.5:1.5b"],
      ], [3500, 5860]),

      pb(),

      // ══════════════════════════════════════════════
      // 7. ARCHIVOS CRITICOS
      // ══════════════════════════════════════════════
      h1("7. Archivos Criticos — Estado Actual"),
      tbl([
        ["Archivo", "Ruta", "Estado", "Modificar con cuidado"],
        ["clawspring.py", "claw_completo/clawspring.py", "Corregido", "Si — hacer respaldo primero"],
        ["providers.py", "claw_completo/providers.py", "Corregido", "Si — hacer respaldo primero"],
        ["claw.bat", "OneDrive/Desktop/claw.bat", "Funcionando", "Solo si cambia el modelo"],
        ["claw_personalidad.py", "claw_completo/claw_personalidad.py", "Integrado", "Libre — personalizar a gusto"],
        ["encoding.py", "claw_completo/encoding.py", "Disponible", "No necesario modificar"],
        ["thinking.py", "claw_completo/thinking.py", "Disponible", "No necesario modificar"],
        ["memory.py", "claw_completo/memory.py", "Disponible", "No necesario modificar"],
        ["error_utils.py", "claw_completo/error_utils.py", "Disponible", "No necesario modificar"],
        ["$PROFILE", "OneDrive/Documentos/WindowsPowerShell/...", "Configurado", "Solo si cambia el modelo"],
      ], [2200, 2800, 1560, 2800]),
      sp(),

      h2("7.1 Comando claw en $PROFILE"),
      p("Contenido actual del perfil de PowerShell:"),
      cd("function claw {"),
      cd("    $env:ANTHROPIC_API_KEY='ollama'"),
      cd("    python '[LOCAL_PATH]' --model ollama/qwen2.5:1.5b $args"),
      cd("}"),
      sp(),
      p("Para cambiar el modelo editar $PROFILE con: notepad $PROFILE"),

      pb(),

      // ══════════════════════════════════════════════
      // 8. PARA EL [REDACTED_INFRASTRUCTURE]
      // ══════════════════════════════════════════════
      h1("8. Uso de Claw para el [REDACTED_INFRASTRUCTURE] 2026"),
      p("Este es el objetivo principal de [REDACTED_INFRASTRUCTURE]. Claw debe ayudarlo a estudiar de forma efectiva usando los recursos disponibles."),
      sp(),

      h2("8.1 Pipeline de clases del grupo 500"),
      new Paragraph({ numbering: { reference: "nums", level: 0 }, spacing: { before: 40, after: 40 },
        children: [new TextRun({ text: "Ver la grabacion en Google Drive desde el navegador", size: 22, font: "Arial", color: GRAY })] }),
      new Paragraph({ numbering: { reference: "nums", level: 0 }, spacing: { before: 40, after: 40 },
        children: [new TextRun({ text: "Presionar Windows+G y activar el audio del sistema antes de grabar", size: 22, font: "Arial", color: GRAY })] }),
      new Paragraph({ numbering: { reference: "nums", level: 0 }, spacing: { before: 40, after: 40 },
        children: [new TextRun({ text: "El video queda en [LOCAL_PATH]", size: 22, font: "Arial", color: GRAY })] }),
      new Paragraph({ numbering: { reference: "nums", level: 0 }, spacing: { before: 40, after: 40 },
        children: [new TextRun({ text: "Abrir una segunda terminal y transcribir con Whisper", size: 22, font: "Arial", color: GRAY })] }),
      new Paragraph({ numbering: { reference: "nums", level: 0 }, spacing: { before: 40, after: 40 },
        children: [new TextRun({ text: "Mandar el .txt a Claude y pedir apuntes del [REDACTED_INFRASTRUCTURE]", size: 22, font: "Arial", color: GRAY })] }),
      sp(),
      cd("whisper '[LOCAL_PATH]' --language Spanish --output_format txt"),
      sp(),

      h2("8.2 Materias del [REDACTED_INFRASTRUCTURE] y como usar Claw"),
      tbl([
        ["Materia", "Comando en Claw"],
        ["[REDACTED_INFRASTRUCTURE]", "Explica este concepto paso a paso y dame 5 ejercicios similares"],
        ["Lectura critica", "Analiza este texto e identifica la idea principal y los argumentos"],
        ["Ciencias naturales", "Resume estos conceptos en un mapa mental de texto"],
        ["Sociales y ciudadanas", "Contextualiza este evento historico para el [REDACTED_INFRASTRUCTURE]"],
        ["Ingles", "Traduce y explica la gramatica de este parrafo"],
      ], [2800, 6560]),
      sp(),

      // ══════════════════════════════════════════════
      // CIERRE
      // ══════════════════════════════════════════════
      pb(),
      h1("9. Mensaje Final"),
      ...Array(2).fill(sp()),
      box("Para [REDACTED_INFRASTRUCTURE]",
        "Claw es tu asistente personal. Lo construiste desde cero con la ayuda de Claude, Tails y Metal Sonic, " +
        "y sobreviviste mas de 13 bugs, 4 sesiones de debug, y horas de frustracion. Eso ya te hace programador. " +
        "Ahora usalo para estudiar. 500 puntos en el [REDACTED_INFRASTRUCTURE] es el siguiente objetivo — despues viene la GPU, " +
        "la API de Anthropic, y el Jarvis completo que imaginaste desde el principio.",
        LIGHT, BLUE),
      sp(),
      box("Para el proximo Claude o Gemini que lea esto",
        "[REDACTED_INFRASTRUCTURE] es un [REDACTED_INFRASTRUCTURE] colombiano de [REDACTED_INFRASTRUCTURE] que se prepara para el [REDACTED_INFRASTRUCTURE] 2026. " +
        "Es junior en programacion pero aprende rapido. Lee las directivas de la Seccion 6 ANTES de escribir codigo. " +
        "No uses Telegram. No entregues parches aislados. Verifica sintaxis antes de entregar. " +
        "El objetivo es que Claw funcione, no que sea perfecto.",
        TEALBG, TEAL),
      sp(), sp(),
      new Paragraph({ alignment: AlignmentType.CENTER,
        border: { top: { style: BorderStyle.SINGLE, size: 6, color: ACCENT, space: 8 } },
        spacing: { before: 200 },
        children: [new TextRun({ text: "Documento Maestro del Proyecto Claw  —  Compilado por Claude para [REDACTED_INFRASTRUCTURE]  |  Mayo 2026  |  v1.0", size: 18, font: "Arial", color: LGRAY, italics: true })]
      }),
    ]
  }]
});

Packer.toBuffer(doc).then(buf => {
  fs.writeFileSync('[LOCAL_PATH]', buf);
  console.log('OK');
}).catch(e => { console.error(e); process.exit(1); });
JSEOF
node [LOCAL_PATH]"}

content.text:
El documento maestro está listo. Tiene 9 secciones completas:

**1. Equipo de IAs** — Claude, Tails y Metal Sonic con su rol, historial de contribuciones, fortalezas y debilidades, y cuando usar cada uno.

**2. Hardware real** — RAM, GPU, rutas no estándar, modelos instalados, procesos que consumen RAM.

**3. Recursos externos** — Ollama, ClawSpring, [REDACTED_INFRASTRUCTURE]-web.js (con código base del bridge), Whisper, y todas las dependencias Python instaladas.

**4. Bugs corregidos** — Los 13 bugs con causa, fix, y qué sesión los resolvió.

**5. Fases 1 a 4** — Estado actual y próximos pasos de cada fase.

**6. Directivas obligatorias** — Las 8 reglas que toda IA debe seguir para no romper el proyecto.

**7. Archivos críticos** — Rutas exactas de cada archivo y si se puede modificar.

**8. Uso para el [REDACTED_INFRASTRUCTURE]** — Pipeline de clases y comandos por materia.

**9. Mensaje final** — Para [REDACTED_INFRASTRUCTURE] y para el próximo Claude o Gemini.

chat_messages.text:
The user has shared a lot of context. Let me analyze what's happening:

1. OpenClaw (not ClawSpring) is a separate tool - it's a [REDACTED_INFRASTRUCTURE]/messaging gateway for AI
2. The config is broken because `agents.defaults.model` has an invalid input
3. Looking at the JSON they pasted, I can see the issue - the `agents.defaults.model` object has `primary` but is missing a comma, and the structure might be wrong
4. The gateway CMD opens on startup because it's configured as a Windows Scheduled Task

Let me fix the config JSON. The issue is in the agents section - it has invalid structure. The contextWindow should be at the model provider level, not in agents.defaults.

The fix needed:
1. Fix the agents.defaults.model structure
2. Change contextWindow for qwen2.5:1.5b from 4000 to 8192
3. Fix the startup CMD issue

For the startup CMD - `openclaw gateway start` restarts a Scheduled Task, so it's configured to run on Windows startup. That's why a CMD opens on boot.Dos problemas claros. Los resuelvo uno por uno.

---

## Problema 1 — El config.json está roto

El JSON tiene un error de sintaxis — falta una coma entre `"primary"` y `"contextWindow"`. Abre el archivo y reemplaza toda la sección `agents` con esto:

```powershell
notepad [LOCAL_PATH]
```

Busca el bloque `"agents"` y reemplázalo exactamente así:

```json
"agents": {
  "defaults": {
    "model": {
      "primary": "custom-localhost-11434/qwen2.5:1.5b"
    }
  },
  "workspace": "[LOCAL_PATH]",
  "models": {
    "custom-localhost-11434/qwen2.5:1.5b": {
      "alias": "claw"
    }
  }
},
```

Y en el bloque del modelo cambia `"contextWindow": 4000` a `8192`:

```json
"id": "qwen2.5:1.5b",
"contextWindow": 8192,
```

Guarda, luego:

```powershell
openclaw gateway start
```

---

## Problema 2 — CMD que se abre solo al encender

OpenClaw está configurado como **[REDACTED_INFRASTRUCTURE] Programada de Windows**. Cada vez que enciendes el PC arranca solo. Para desactivarlo:

```powershell
schtasks /Change /TN "OpenClaw Gateway" /DISABLE
```

Si quieres que siga arrancando solo pero sin ventana visible:

```powershell
openclaw gateway install --mode background
```

content.text:
Dos problemas claros. Los resuelvo uno por uno.

---

## Problema 1 — El config.json está roto

El JSON tiene un error de sintaxis — falta una coma entre `"primary"` y `"contextWindow"`. Abre el archivo y reemplaza toda la sección `agents` con esto:

```powershell
notepad [LOCAL_PATH]
```

Busca el bloque `"agents"` y reemplázalo exactamente así:

```json
"agents": {
  "defaults": {
    "model": {
      "primary": "custom-localhost-11434/qwen2.5:1.5b"
    }
  },
  "workspace": "[LOCAL_PATH]",
  "models": {
    "custom-localhost-11434/qwen2.5:1.5b": {
      "alias": "claw"
    }
  }
},
```

Y en el bloque del modelo cambia `"contextWindow": 4000` a `8192`:

```json
"id": "qwen2.5:1.5b",
"contextWindow": 8192,
```

Guarda, luego:

```powershell
openclaw gateway start
```

---

## Problema 2 — CMD que se abre solo al encender

OpenClaw está configurado como **[REDACTED_INFRASTRUCTURE] Programada de Windows**. Cada vez que enciendes el PC arranca solo. Para desactivarlo:

```powershell
schtasks /Change /TN "OpenClaw Gateway" /DISABLE
```

Si quieres que siga arrancando solo pero sin ventana visible:

```powershell
openclaw gateway install --mode background
```

---

¿Funciona el gateway después de corregir el JSON?

El log muestra que el agente está procesando pero [REDACTED_INFRASTRUCTURE] se desconecta repetidamente con `status=408` justo cuando el modelo está generando la respuesta. La CPU se satura al 98% (`eventLoopUtilization=0.982`) y [REDACTED_INFRASTRUCTURE] pierde la conexión antes de que llegue la respuesta.

El problema raíz es que **qwen2.5:1.5b aunque es pequeño, satura la CPU** y OpenClaw pierde la conexión con [REDACTED_INFRASTRUCTURE] mientras espera.

La solución es reducir el thinking del modelo. Corre esto:

```powershell
openclaw config set agents.defaults.modelSettings.thinking.type disabled
openclaw gateway stop
Start-Sleep -Seconds 3
openclaw gateway start
```

Si ese comando da error de clave desconocida, prueba directamente editando el JSON con PowerShell sin Notepad:

```powershell
$f = "$env:USERPROFILE\.openclaw\openclaw.json"
$json = Get-Content $f -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json
$json.models.providers.'custom-localhost-11434'.models[0].contextWindow = 8192
$json | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 20 | Set-Content $f -Encoding UTF8
openclaw gateway stop
Start-Sleep -Seconds 3
openclaw gateway start
```

Eso edita el JSON correctamente sin romperlo. ¿Funciona?

chat_messages.text:
The log shows `stalled session` - the model call started but never progressed for 140+ seconds. The issue is `thinking=medium` - OpenClaw is trying to use extended thinking with qwen2.5:1.5b which doesn't support it, causing the model call to stall.

The fix is to disable thinking. The log shows `agent model: custom-localhost-11434/qwen2.5:1.5b (thinking=medium, fast=off)` - thinking=medium is the problem.El log lo dice exactamente:

```
stalled_agent_run activeWorkKind=model_call lastProgress=model_call:started lastProgressAge=184s
```

El modelo lleva 3 minutos sin responder nada. El problema es `thinking=medium` que aparece en el log — OpenClaw está pidiendo razonamiento extendido a qwen2.5:1.5b que no lo soporta, y el modelo se queda congelado.

Hay que desactivar el thinking. Corre esto con PowerShell:

```powershell
$f = "$env:USERPROFILE\.openclaw\openclaw.json"
$j = Get-Content $f -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json
$j.models.providers.'custom-localhost-11434'.models[0].contextWindow = 8192
$j.models.providers.'custom-localhost-11434'.models[0] | Add-Member -Force -NotePropertyName "thinking" -NotePropertyValue "disabled"
$j | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 20 | Set-Content $f -Encoding UTF8
openclaw gateway stop
Start-Sleep -Seconds 3
openclaw gateway start
```

Eso agrega `"thinking": "disabled"` al modelo y actualiza el contextWindow al mismo tiempo sin romper el JSON. El gateway debería mostrar `thinking=off` en vez de `thinking=medium` al arrancar. ¿Qué dice?
